subject: august 10, 2001 meeting - call if you will

emails.subject: Re: FW: August 10, 2001 Meeting - Call if you will
emails.subject_base: August 10, 2001 Meeting - Call if you will
emails.body: Re: FW: August 10, 2001 Meeting Call if you will done and not just that; I'm cruising the internet, investigating the Broadmoor's "professional" tennis camp for the weekend of August 10, 11, 12 and booking rooms. I asked for 4. How's your game? In the meanwhile I've been trying to call you but I can't get through to Portland. Is it raining there? Give me a call. Christian Yoder/ENRON@enronXgate 06/11/2001 04:10 PM

emails.subject: RE: FW: August 10, 2001 Meeting - Call if you will
emails.subject_base: August 10, 2001 Meeting - Call if you will
emails.body: RE: FW: August 10, 2001 Meeting Call if you will So great is the humor about all this WSPP stuff and the tennis backdrop that I would be willing to "come out of retirement" and enter the doubles combat zone. The thought of Clyde Durham, itinerant journeyman, former Bible School doubles player from Kansas, striding on to the court to do battle with that little runt of a MIke Small, this fuels my competitive imagination to the point of red hot coals. I need to go see my cousin in Boulder and could work something in around this event. If there is room for me to go to the WSPP meeting, not the full camp thing, and you don't mind, consider me in. ----cgy
